# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for our microservices architecture. Configure route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways. Skip VPC Flow Logs to reduce AWS costs in our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable logging after we secure seed funding.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

---
Resources:
  MyVPC:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC'
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: VpcForMicroservicesArchitecture
  
  MyInternetGateway:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::InternetGateway'
    
  AttachGatewayToVPC:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref MyInternetGateway
  
  MySubnet1:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2a
  
  MySubnet2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:<｜begin▁of▁sentence｜>
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2b
  
  MyNatGateway:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::NatGateway'
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatAllocation.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref MyPublicSubnet
      
  NatAllocation:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::EIP'
  
  RouteTable1:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::RouteTable'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
    
  MainRoute:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Route'
    DependsOn: AttachGatewayToVPC
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable1
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref MyNatGateway
  
  SubnetAssociation1:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation'
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable1
      SubnetId: !Ref MySubnet1
  
  SubnetAssociation2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation'
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable1
      SubnetId: !Ref MySubnet2
      
Outputs:
  VPCID:
    Description: "VPC ID"
    Value: !Ref MyVPC
